ProjectInfo.title: REST Client App 🌐⚡
ProjectInfo.description: A lightweight Postman-like tool to make, manage, and track RESTful API requests with authentication, code generation, and history.
ProjectInfo.techList: Next.js, React, TypeScript, TailwindCSS, Shadcn UI, NextAuth.js, Prisma, MongoDB
ProjectInfo.featuresList: REST Client editor, Authentication, Request History, Variables, Internationalization, Generated Code
ProjectInfo.teamList: Aleksey Drozdov - Mentor, Iuliia Barinova - Developer, Dzmitry Drevich - Developer, Andrey Tishchenko - Developer
